_comment: Sonnet for most tasks. Reasonable limits, good quality-to-cost ratio.
Best for: most teams, daily development, standard feature work.
Copy this file to your project's .claude/settings.json

model._comment: Sonnet offers strong reasoning at moderate cost. Use Opus for truly complex tasks.

preferences._comment: Auto-approve read operations to reduce approval friction.

CLAUDE.md._comment: Standard template (~700 tokens) gives good context without excess overhead.

fileReading._comment: Allow full file reads for better understanding, within reason.

permissions._comment: Allow standard dev operations. Block installs, destructive ops, and network calls.

behavior._comment: Read what you need, search when efficient, no artificial restrictions.

costGuardrails._comment: Generous limits for standard development. Warn before long sessions.
